title: Lennar: No Margin Of Safety From A Cyclical Perspective
text: The homebuilding sector is cyclical. There is a 0.6 correlation between the US Housing Starts and LEN's revenue. Any valuation of LEN should be based on its cyclical performance. The challenge is in determining LEN's cyclical value as it had significant acquisitions. There is not enough cyclical info on this larger entity.
